title: Broadcast
description: A Vibes Platform broadcast representing a scheduled or sent SMS or push notification message send to a subscription list.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the broadcast.

message_type.description: Type of message channel for the broadcast.

message_text.description: Message content template. Supports personalization placeholders using {{field_name}} syntax.

subscription_list_id.description: Identifier of the subscription list this broadcast is delivered to.

scheduled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the broadcast is scheduled to send.

sent_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the broadcast was actually sent.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the broadcast was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the broadcast was last updated.

examples.name: Summer Sale Announcement
examples.message_text: Hi {{first_name}}! Our Summer Sale starts now - 30% off everything. Reply STOP to opt out.
